response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including significant work in C++ (11+ years) and leadership roles (e.g., Staff Engineer at Naver). However, his experience is heavily skewed toward full-stack and web/mobile development rather than large-scale cloud infrastructure, distributed systems, or compute/storage hardware architecture, which are core to the role. His cloud-related experience (e.g., AWS CDK) is limited and not production-level. Mentorship and leadership are demonstrated, but not explicitly in cloud/DevOps contexts.
strengths: Extensive C++ experience (11+ years) meeting the minimum requirement
Strong leadership and mentorship background (e.g., organizing workshops, Refactoring Dojos)
Demonstrated ability to work across full-stack, distributed systems, and embedded domains
concerns: Limited direct experience with large-scale cloud compute platforms or distributed systems architecture
No explicit production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs
Most recent roles (Naver, Tencent) focus on AI-agent infrastructure and web/mobile platforms rather than core cloud compute
